Package org.example.repository

Interface WaitlistRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
InMemoryWaitlistRepository
public interface WaitlistRepository
Defines the operations for waitlist persistence.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    existsForSlotAndCustomer(LocalDateTime slotDateTime, String customerName, String customerEmail)
    Checks whether a customer already exists on the waitlist for a slot.
    List<WaitlistEntry>
    findAll()
    Returns all waitlist entries.
    List<WaitlistEntry>
    findBySlotDateTime(LocalDateTime slotDateTime)
    Returns the waitlist entries for a slot.
    Optional<WaitlistEntry>
    pollFirstBySlotDateTime(LocalDateTime slotDateTime)
    Removes and returns the first entry for a slot.
    void
    save(WaitlistEntry entry)
    Saves a waitlist entry.
    void
    saveFirst(WaitlistEntry entry)
    Restores a waitlist entry to the front of the queue.

  • Method Details

    • save

      void save(WaitlistEntry entry)
      Saves a waitlist entry.
      Parameters:
      entry - value for waitlist entry

    • saveFirst

      void saveFirst(WaitlistEntry entry)
      Restores a waitlist entry to the front of the queue.
      Parameters:
      entry - value for waitlist entry

    • findAll

      List<WaitlistEntry> findAll()
      Returns all waitlist entries.
      Returns:
      collection with the requested results

    • findBySlotDateTime

      List<WaitlistEntry> findBySlotDateTime(LocalDateTime slotDateTime)
      Returns the waitlist entries for a slot.
      Parameters:
      slotDateTime - date/time used to find matching entries
      Returns:
      collection with the requested results

    • pollFirstBySlotDateTime

      Optional<WaitlistEntry> pollFirstBySlotDateTime(LocalDateTime slotDateTime)
      Removes and returns the first entry for a slot.
      Parameters:
      slotDateTime - date/time used to find matching entries
      Returns:
      optional value if data is found

    • existsForSlotAndCustomer

      boolean existsForSlotAndCustomer(LocalDateTime slotDateTime, String customerName, String customerEmail)
      Checks whether a customer already exists on the waitlist for a slot.
      Parameters:
      slotDateTime - date/time used to find matching entries
      customerName - value for customer name
      customerEmail - value for customer email
      Returns:
      true when the customer is already present, otherwise false
